description: Verso: Account of some sort, unclear if private or official. In Arabic script. It seems to be specifying the amounts owed to Abū l-Faraj. Mentions several dates and possibly the years 722 and 723 AH = 1322/23 and 1323/24 CE, which would fit paleographically and diplomatically. Needs examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
